CONTENT.heading: 1. Register
CONTENT.body: Create an account as a patient or doctor. Registration takes less than a minute and only requires an email address.

CONTENT.heading: 2. Complete your profile
CONTENT.body: Patients provide their national ID number. Doctors select their specialization and the examinations they perform in the system.

CONTENT.heading: 3. Book an examination
CONTENT.body: The patient selects an examination type from the list of available services. The system automatically assigns an attending physician.

CONTENT.heading: 4. Receive results
CONTENT.body: After the appointment, the doctor enters the results. The patient receives an email notification and a QR code providing public access to the report.

CONTENT.heading: For patients
CONTENT.body: The platform enables convenient booking of diagnostic examinations, tracking appointment history, and secure access to results anytime, anywhere.

CONTENT.heading: For doctors
CONTENT.body: Doctors manage their appointment schedule, issue examination results, and maintain medical records in one place.

CONTENT.heading: For medical facilities
CONTENT.body: The Diagnostyka system streamlines documentation flow and communication between staff and patients, reducing administrative processing time.

CONTENT.heading: Technical support
CONTENT.body: For platform issues, contact us at: support@diagnostyka.pl

CONTENT.heading: Customer service
CONTENT.body: Questions about your account, bookings, or results: kontakt@diagnostyka.pl — we respond within 24 hours on business days.

CONTENT.heading: Address
CONTENT.body: Diagnostyka S.A., ul. Medyczna 12, 00-001 Warsaw, Poland.

CONTENT.heading: Is my data secure?
CONTENT.body: Yes. All data is stored in an encrypted database. The national ID number is encrypted and never shared with third parties.

CONTENT.heading: How do I access my results?
CONTENT.body: Results are available in the History tab on your profile. You can also use the QR code, which links to a public report.

CONTENT.heading: What if no doctor is available?
CONTENT.body: The system assigns a doctor automatically based on specialization. If no doctor is available for the selected examination, you will be notified.

CONTENT.heading: Can I cancel an appointment?
CONTENT.body: Yes, active appointments can be cancelled from the Active tab on your profile before they are carried out.

CONTENT.heading: Laboratory tests
CONTENT.body: Blood count, glucose, cholesterol, liver function tests, thyroid hormones, and many other biochemical tests.

CONTENT.heading: Imaging diagnostics
CONTENT.body: X-ray, ultrasound, and other imaging examinations performed by qualified specialists.

CONTENT.heading: Cardiac examinations
CONTENT.body: ECG, Holter monitoring, stress tests, and cardiology consultations available through the platform.

CONTENT.heading: Preventive screenings
CONTENT.body: Screening packages tailored to the patient's age and gender, supporting early disease detection.

CONTENT.heading: How to book?
CONTENT.body: Log in to your account, go to the Active tab, and click '+ New'. Select an examination from the list of available services.

CONTENT.heading: When will the appointment take place?
CONTENT.body: After booking, the system assigns a doctor. Appointment details will appear in the Active tab of your profile.

CONTENT.heading: Cancelling a booking
CONTENT.body: You can cancel an appointment at any time before it takes place using the Cancel button next to the entry.

CONTENT.heading: Where are my results?
CONTENT.body: All completed examinations are available in the History tab on your profile. The result and doctor's notes are shown.

CONTENT.heading: QR code for results
CONTENT.body: Each completed result has a unique QR code. It provides access to a public report without logging in — you can share it with a doctor or employer.

CONTENT.heading: How long are results stored?
CONTENT.body: Results are stored indefinitely on your account, in accordance with medical documentation requirements.

CONTENT.heading: What is the QR code for?
CONTENT.body: The QR code is a quick way to share examination results without needing to log in. Simply scan the code to view the report.

CONTENT.heading: Where to find the QR code?
CONTENT.body: The QR code is available next to each completed examination in the History tab on your profile.

CONTENT.heading: Is the result public?
CONTENT.body: Yes, the report accessible via QR code is public — anyone with the link can view it. Do not share the code with unauthorised persons.

CONTENT.heading: Schedule overview
CONTENT.body: The Active tab shows all upcoming appointments assigned to your doctor account.

CONTENT.heading: Completed appointments
CONTENT.body: The history of all completed examinations is available in the History tab. You can review entered results and notes.

CONTENT.heading: Managing examinations
CONTENT.body: In your profile settings you can update the list of examinations you perform, which affects automatic patient assignment.

CONTENT.heading: How to issue a result?
CONTENT.body: In the Active tab, click the Complete button next to the selected appointment. Fill in the Result field (required) and optional Diagnostic Notes.

CONTENT.heading: What happens after issuing?
CONTENT.body: The system automatically marks the appointment as completed, generates a QR code, and sends an email notification to the patient.

CONTENT.heading: Can a result be edited?
CONTENT.body: Once issued, a result cannot be edited. In case of an error, contact the system administrator.

CONTENT.heading: Complete your profile
CONTENT.body: Go to the Settings tab on your profile to fill in your first name, last name, and medical specialization.

CONTENT.heading: Managing examinations
CONTENT.body: In settings you can select the examinations you perform. The system uses this to automatically assign patients to you.

CONTENT.heading: Profile visibility
CONTENT.body: Your specialization and list of examinations are visible to patients when booking an appointment.

CONTENT.heading: Terms of use
CONTENT.body: Using the Diagnostyka platform implies acceptance of these terms. The platform is intended only for registered adult users.

CONTENT.heading: Personal data protection
CONTENT.body: The data controller is Diagnostyka S.A. Data is processed in accordance with GDPR for the purpose of providing medical services.

CONTENT.heading: Liability
CONTENT.body: Diagnostyka S.A. is not liable for medical decisions made based on results available on the platform without consulting a doctor.

CONTENT.heading: Data controller
CONTENT.body: The controller of your personal data is Diagnostyka S.A., based in Warsaw.

CONTENT.heading: Purpose of processing
CONTENT.body: Data is processed to provide diagnostic services, manage user accounts, and communicate regarding appointments and results.

CONTENT.heading: Your rights
CONTENT.body: You have the right to access, correct, delete, and transfer your data. You may also withdraw consent to processing at any time.

CONTENT.heading: DPO contact
CONTENT.body: For data protection matters, contact our Data Protection Officer: iod@diagnostyka.pl

CONTENT.heading: What are cookies?
CONTENT.body: Cookies are small text files saved on your device by the browser. They enable the platform to function correctly and remember your preferences.

CONTENT.heading: Which cookies do we use?
CONTENT.body: We use only essential cookies for authentication session management (access_token, refresh_token). We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.

CONTENT.heading: Managing cookies
CONTENT.body: You can disable cookies in your browser settings, however this may prevent you from logging in to the platform.
